LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONERS MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC AND KYLE M. BACKUS' PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND ENTER JUDGMENT THEREON. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS THE FOLLOWING TENTATIVE RULING: PETITIONERS MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC AND KYLE M. BACKUS' UNOPPOSED "PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND ENTER JUDGMENT THEREON" IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED AND IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: RICHARD B, ULMER JR., CLERK: R. WOODS, NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU) ***AFTER HEARING: ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petitioners Morgan Stanley Smith Barney Llc And Kyle M. Backus'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon
Off Calendar Jun-22-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Petitioners Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC And Kyle M. Backus' Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The court adopts the following tentative ruling:

Petitioners Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC And Kyle M. Backus' unopposed "petition to confirm arbitration award and enter judgment thereon" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B, Ulmer Jr., Clerk: R. Woods, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***After hearing: order is signed. (see scanned order for details)
